description: Operational graph for cb-okf, CB's OKF integration extension folded into composable-beliefs (okf/): backlog directives, conventions, and obligations for adopting, converting, and maintaining knowledge bundles built with the standard. The methodology content lives as OKF docs alongside this graph (okf/standard/, okf/meta/, okf/demo/) and the tooling that implements it (mix okf.*, lib/cb/okf/*); this graph carries the work. The cb-okf: namespace borrows cb: schema vocabulary (kind/domain/artifact-scheme enums) and sits downstream of cb: (depends_on: cb). The name cb-okf marks it as CB's dialect of OKF: the OKF floor (markdown + frontmatter + index) plus CB's additions - the agent-index manifest and the two-tier model - rather than being OKF-native.
